MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is Off calendar. The January 8, 2021 proof of service by overnight delivery is deficient in that it does not reflect the address at which defendant was purportedly served. (See Cal. R. Ct. 3.1300(c) [proof of service of the moving papers must be filed no later than five court days before the time appointed for the hearing].)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion For Order Deeming Each Request As Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC's Motion For Order Deeming Each Request As Admitted:

No opposition filed; motion granted. The facts reflected in the Requests for Admission will be deemed admitted unless responses to the discovery are served at/before the hearing on this matter. Sanctions in the amount of $60 awarded to Plaintiff.

Moving party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court via email to davididaho14@gmail.com

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
